approvedAdoptPolicyConfigured.message: Approved adopt allowlist is configured with all 9 exact policies.

liveAllowlistedConflictMatches.message: Approved adopt policies are configured, but current Shopify state no longer exposes those handle conflicts. This is store drift, not a policy misconfiguration.

requiredMetafieldsReady.message: Required import and taxonomy metafield definitions exist with compatible types.

ruleBackedCollectionsResolved.message: All rule-backed approved collections resolve in Shopify.

pendingCollectionsNonBlocking.message: Pending collections are explicitly reported and no longer appear as blocking missing collections.

prepareAdminProductMutationGuard.message: prepare-admin routes only to admin prep logic and does not reference product mutation operations.
